title: BetterCraft
description: "BetterCraft” is a modpack designed to sublimate the gaming experience while respecting the essence of Minecraft. It enriches every aspect of the game, from atmosphere and interface to creatures, structures and dimensions.
body:
This modpack enriches all aspects of the game, from ambience and interface to creatures, structures and dimensions.The aim is to bring visual, gameplay and performance improvements without distorting the original game.

Here are some of the mods included in this modpack:


## 🌄 Ambience and immersion
> This group of mods enhances the game's atmosphere with smoother animations, realistic sound effects and visual details that reinforce immersion.

Animations are reworked with Animation Overhaul, Better Combat, Fresh Animation, Fresh Moves, Fresh Skeleton Physics and Spawn Animation, making combat and mob movements more natural.
Particles and environmental effects are enhanced with Particular, Explosive Enhancement, Make Bubble Pop, Particle Rain and Better Falling Block Particles, making every action more dynamic.
Sound ambience becomes more realistic with Dynamic Surroundings, Sound Physics Remastered, Immersive Thunder and Drip Sound, which modify echo and sound effects according to the environment.
Flowers and plants are more detailed with Dense Flowers, Bushier Flowers, Fancy Crops and Snow Real Magic, which enrich the flora and impact of snow.
Voice interaction is added with Voice Interaction and Simple Voice Chat, enabling in-game talking.

## 🐉 Creatures and interactions
> This group concerns mobs, their behavior and the interactions between them and the player.
Classic creatures are diversified with Creeper Overhaul, Enderman Overhaul and More Mob Variants, which add different appearances to basic mobs.
New creatures appear with Naturalist, which adds animals such as elephants and birds, and AdventureZ, which adds bosses mainly in the Nether.
Villager interactions are enhanced with Villager Names, Villager Transportation, Trade Cycling, Villager Converting and Smarter Farmers, making their management more intuitive.
Hostile mobs evolve with Horde Night, where waves of enemies attack regularly, and Hostile Mobs Improve Over Time, which makes monsters more dangerous as the game progresses.

## 🏰 Structures and dimensions
> These mods modify world generation by enriching the biomes, structures and dimensions of the Nether and End.
The Overworld is transformed with Tectonic, Terralith and Distant Horizons, adding more varied and detailed landscapes. Explorify, Towns and Towers and Unnamed Desert enhance villages and natural structures.
Dungeons and temples become more complex with Yung's Better Dungeons, Yung's Better Jungle Temples, Yung's Better Strongholds and Dungeons and Taverns, which add traps and interesting loot.
The Nether is enriched by Better Nether, Nether Depths Upgrade, Young's Better Nether Fortresses and MNS Moog's Nether Structure, which add new biomes, mobs and more detailed fortresses.
The End is brought to life with Better End, Better End Cities Vanilla, Yung's Better End Island and MES Moog's End Structures, which improve island generation and boss battles.

## ⚔️ Items and equipment
> This group of mods modifies items, tools and equipment, adding new functionalities and visual enhancements.
Elytra become customizable with Customizable Elytra, Elytra Takeoff, Elytra Physics and Elytra Trims, making their use more realistic and varied.
Enchantments are better displayed thanks to Enchant Icons, which display specific icons on enchanted books according to their type (flame for a fire enchantment, etc.).
Interaction with objects is enhanced with Toggle Item Frames, Visual Workbench and Easy Shulker Boxes, which facilitate the organization of objects and tools.
Farming and breeding benefit from Crops Love Rain, which accelerates crop growth in the rain, and Animal Feeding Trough, which allows animals to feed themselves with a feeder.
New decorations include Dusty Decorations, which adds furniture and kitchen utensils, and Chiseled Bookshelf Visualizer, which displays the contents of enchanted bookshelves.


## 🖥️ Interface and ergonomics
>These mods enhance the user experience by making menus, inventory and in-game interactions easier to navigate.
Information display is improved with Default Dark Mode, Dynamic Crosshair, Better F3, Day Counter and Status Effect Bars, which add more legible indications to the screen.
Inventory becomes more practical with Inventory Management, Inv Move, Mouse Tweaks and Pick Up Notifier, which add shortcuts and notifications of picked-up items.
Map and exploration are optimized with Xaero's Map, Zoomify and Free Cam, which provide a better overview of the terrain.
Menu ergonomics are revamped with Mod Menu, Recolourful Containers and Cherished Worlds, which improve interface readability.


Whether you're a game veteran or a new player, “BetterCraft” offers you a refreshingly immersive experience, while staying true to what makes Minecraft unique.
